name: myareareport
description: UK area reports using public data: crime, flood, planning, house prices, and air quality.

interface.shortDescription: UK area reports from public data — crime, flood, planning and more.
interface.longDescription: MyAreaReport provides structured UK area reports using public datasets, including reported crime, flood warnings, planning applications, sold house prices, and air quality readings. It helps users understand local public information for any UK postcode. It does not provide emergency advice, property valuations, crime prediction, or safety rankings.

screenshots.alt: Area briefing card for CH1 4AB showing crime incidents, flood warnings, and planning applications in a single scannable card
Crime statistics widget showing 183 reported incidents over 12 months with top categories
Postcode comparison card showing CH1 4AB alongside M1 1AA with crime and flood data side by side
Planning applications widget near CH1 4AB listing 3 applications with status badges and distances
